title: Marketplace entry (common fields)
description: Fields shared by every marketplace primitive (plugin, skill, mcp). Type schemas pin `type` and reuse this.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Must match the entry's directory name.

name.description: Display name shown in the marketplace.

tagline.description: One short sentence shown under the name in list views.

description.description: Full description shown on the detail view. Markdown is allowed.

icon.description: Relative path to an icon next to entry.json, or an absolute https URL. Relative paths are copied and rewritten to absolute URLs at generation time.

verified.description: True for entries reviewed and trusted by Cline.

featured.description: Surface this entry in featured placements.

install.description: Drives the `cline <type> install ...` one-liner. `args` is everything after the subcommand; the verb is derived from `type`.

env.description: Secrets / environment variables the primitive needs at runtime that are not part of the install command (e.g. EXA_API_KEY).

notes.description: Optional post-install guidance shown on the detail view.
